Title: Category Navigation - Main Menu
Steps:
1. Hover over main menu
2. Verify category dropdown appears
3. Click on top-level category
4. Verify category page loads
Expected Result:
- Menu displays categories
- Subcategories visible on hover
- Category page loads correctly

Title: Category Page - Product Grid View
Steps:
1. Navigate to category
2. Click Grid view icon
3. Verify product cards display
Expected Result:
- Products shown in grid layout
- Image, name, price visible
- Add to cart button present

Title: Category Page - Product List View
Steps:
1. Navigate to category
2. Click List view icon
3. Verify list layout
Expected Result:
- Products shown in list format
- More details visible per product
- Actions accessible

Title: Category - Facet Filtering
Steps:
1. Navigate to category with facets
2. Click on a facet value (e.g., Brand)
3. Verify products filter
4. Apply additional facet
5. Verify combined filtering
Expected Result:
- Facet panel visible
- Clicking facet filters results
- Multiple facets combine
- Result count updates

Title: Category - Price Range Filter
Steps:
1. Navigate to category
2. Locate price range filter
3. Set min and max values
4. Apply filter
5. Verify filtered results
Expected Result:
- Price slider/inputs work
- Results filtered to range
- Products outside range hidden

Title: Category - Clear Filters
Steps:
1. Apply multiple filters
2. Click 'Clear all' or 'Reset'
3. Verify filters removed
Expected Result:
- All filters cleared
- Full product list restored
- Filter UI reset

Title: Category - Sorting Options
Steps:
1. Navigate to category
2. Open sort dropdown
3. Select 'Price: Low to High'
4. Verify order
5. Select 'Price: High to Low'
6. Verify reverse order
Expected Result:
- Sort options available
- Products reorder correctly
- Sort persists on pagination

Title: Category - Pagination
Steps:
1. Navigate to category
2. Scroll to pagination
3. Click page 2
4. Verify new products load
5. Click Previous
6. Verify return to page 1
Expected Result:
- Pagination controls visible
- Pages load correctly
- Product count consistent

Title: Category - Products Per Page
Steps:
1. Navigate to category
2. Change 'per page' dropdown
3. Select different value (e.g., 24)
4. Verify more products display
Expected Result:
- Per page options available
- Product count changes
- URL/state updates

Title: Product Detail - Basic Info
Steps:
1. Navigate to product detail page
2. Verify all info displays
Expected Result:
- Product name correct
- Price displayed
- Description visible
- Images load
- SKU shown

Title: Product Detail - Image Gallery
Steps:
1. View product page
2. Click thumbnail images
3. Verify main image changes
4. Click zoom/enlarge
Expected Result:
- Thumbnails clickable
- Main image updates
- Zoom functionality works

Title: Product Variations - B2C Style
Steps:
1. Navigate to configurable product
2. Select color option
3. Select size option
4. Verify price updates
5. Add to cart
Expected Result:
- Variation selectors display
- Price reflects selections
- Correct variant added to cart

Title: Product - Related Products
Steps:
1. View product detail page
2. Scroll to related products
3. Verify recommendations display
Expected Result:
- Related products section visible
- Products are relevant
- Can navigate to related

Title: Filter Chips - Facet Filter Chip Display
Steps:
1. Navigate to category
2. Apply a facet filter (e.g., Brand)
3. Verify chip appears with filter name
4. Verify close (×) button on chip
5. Verify product count updates
Expected Result:
- Chip displays with correct label
- Close button functional
- Product count accurate
- Chip removal updates URL

Title: Filter Chips - Checkbox Control Chips (Show in stock)
Steps:
1. Toggle 'Show in stock' checkbox
2. Verify chip appears labeled 'Show in stock'
3. Verify close button removes only this filter
4. Verify product count updates
Expected Result:
- Chip appears/disappears with checkbox toggle
- Individual close button works
- Only this filter removed
- Other filters preserved

Title: Filter Chips - Checkbox Control Chips (Purchased before)
Preconditions: Category page, user has purchase history
Steps:
1. Toggle 'Purchased before' checkbox
2. Verify chip appears
3. Verify close button removes filter
4. Verify product count updates
Expected Result:
- Chip appears for purchased before filter
- Removable via close button
- Filter state syncs with checkbox
- Product count accurate

Title: Filter Chips - Checkbox Control Chips (Available at branches)
Preconditions: Category page with branch selection enabled
Steps:
1. Select branches in 'Available at branches'
2. Verify chip appears with branch count
3. Verify close button removes filter
4. Verify product count updates
Expected Result:
- Chip shows branch count
- Removable via close button
- All selected branches cleared
- Product count accurate

Title: Reset Filters - Combined Facet + Checkbox Reset
Preconditions: Category page with multiple filter types
Steps:
1. Apply facet filter (e.g., Brand)
2. Toggle 'Show in stock' checkbox
3. Verify multiple chips appear
4. Click 'Reset filters' button
5. Verify ALL filters cleared
Expected Result:
- All chips removed
- All checkboxes unchecked
- URL cleaned (no filter params)
- Full product list restored
- Reset button disappears when no filters

Title: Reset Filters - Zero Results State
Steps:
1. Apply filters until 0 products shown
2. Verify 'No results' message displays
3. Verify 'Reset filters' button appears prominently
4. Click reset button
5. Verify product list restored
Expected Result:
- Reset button visible below no-results message
- Button prominently displayed
- Clicking restores full product list
- All filters cleared

Title: Reset Filters - Category Page Context Preserved
Steps:
1. Navigate to category page (e.g., /printers)
2. Apply multiple filters
3. Click 'Reset filters' button
4. Verify still on same category page
5. Verify category products restored
Expected Result:
- Stays on same category page (NOT redirected to /catalog)
- Category context preserved
- Category products restored
- URL shows category path

Title: Reset Filters - Search Results Preserve Search Term
Steps:
1. Search for 'printer'
2. Apply filters on search results
3. Click 'Reset filters' button
4. Verify search term preserved
5. Verify filters cleared
Expected Result:
- Filters cleared
- Search term remains in search bar
- Search results restored (without filters)
- URL shows search term, no filter params

Title: Filter Chips - Individual Close vs Reset All
Steps:
1. Apply 3+ filters (mix facet + checkbox)
2. Close ONE chip via × button
3. Verify only that filter removed
4. Close another chip
5. Use Reset button for remaining filters
Expected Result:
- Individual close removes single filter only
- Other filters preserved after single close
- Reset button clears all remaining filters
- Product count updates after each action

Title: Filters - Browser Back/Forward Navigation
Steps:
1. Apply filter A
2. Apply filter B
3. Press browser Back button
4. Verify filter B removed
5. Press browser Forward button
6. Verify filter B restored
Expected Result:
- Browser history correctly tracks facet filter URL params
- Back button removes last filter
- Forward button restores filter
- Chips sync with browser navigation

Title: Filters - Page Refresh Preserves State
Steps:
1. Apply multiple filters
2. Refresh page (F5 or Ctrl+R)
3. Verify filters preserved from URL
4. Verify chips render correctly
5. Verify reset button works
Expected Result:
- Filter state persisted via URL params
- Chips render after refresh
- Checkboxes checked correctly
- Reset button functional after refresh

Title: Filters - Multi-select Within Facet Group
Steps:
1. Select 2+ values in same facet (e.g., Brand: HP + Epson)
2. Verify separate chips for each value
3. Verify facet header shows count
4. Close one chip via × button
5. Verify only that value removed
Expected Result:
- Individual chips per facet value
- Facet header shows selected count (e.g., Brand (2))
- Individual chip removal works
- Other values in same facet preserved
- Product count updates

Title: Search - Basic Query
Steps:
1. Click search bar
2. Enter product name 'laptop'
3. Press Enter
4. Verify results
Expected Result:
- Search executes
- Results page displays
- Matching products shown
- Result count visible

Title: Search - Suggestions Dropdown
Steps:
1. Click search bar
2. Start typing 'lap'
3. Wait for suggestions
4. Verify dropdown appears
Expected Result:
- Suggestions appear while typing
- Products match partial query
- Can click suggestion

Title: Search - No Results
Steps:
1. Enter nonsense query 'xyzabc123'
2. Execute search
3. Verify empty state
Expected Result:
- No results message displayed
- Suggests alternatives
- No errors

Title: Search - Special Characters
Steps:
1. Search for queries with special chars:
   - 'test & test'
   - 'product (new)'
   - 'item #123'
2. Verify handling
Expected Result:
- Special characters handled
- No errors or crashes
- Appropriate results

Title: Search - Within Category
Steps:
1. Navigate to specific category
2. Use search while in category
3. Verify scoped results
Expected Result:
- Search scoped to category
- Results from current category only
- Clear indication of scope

Title: Search - Filters on Results
Steps:
1. Execute search query
2. Apply facet filter
3. Apply price filter
4. Verify combined results
Expected Result:
- Filters available on search results
- Filters combine correctly
- Count updates

Title: Search - Sorting Results
Steps:
1. Execute search
2. Change sort order
3. Verify products reorder
Expected Result:
- Sort options on search results
- Products sort correctly
- Relevance option available

Title: Search - History
Steps:
1. Click search bar
2. Verify recent searches show
3. Click on history item
4. Verify search executes
Expected Result:
- Search history displayed
- Can select from history
- History clears on request

Title: Organization Search - Find Org
Steps:
1. Navigate to organization search
2. Enter organization name
3. Verify results
4. Click on organization
Expected Result:
- Organization search available
- Results match query
- Can view org details

Title: Organization Search - Filters
Steps:
1. Search organizations
2. Apply industry filter
3. Apply location filter
4. Verify filtered results
Expected Result:
- Org filters available
- Filters work correctly
- Combined filtering works
